selected_dialects.reason: Rectangular base plate with boss, triangular ribs, and corner hole pattern — all within the sketch_extrude prismatic part envelope. extrude_rectangle for the 100x60x10mm base, add_rectangular_boss for the 20x15x20mm central boss, add_rib for the 4mm triangular gussets on both boss sides, cut_hole_pattern_linear for four Ø6mm corner holes.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only — not certified, not manufacturing-ready, not structurally validated.
Triangular rib geometry (4mm thick, gusset-style) will be best-effort within sketch_extrude add_rib parameters; exact triangular profile may require post-generation inspection.
